reference.citation: Bethe ansatz thermodynamic-limit result e_inf = 1/4 - ln(2) for the spin-1/2 antiferromagnetic Heisenberg chain.
reference.notes: Finite open-boundary E/N is expected to approach this trend reference with boundary corrections; it is not a strict finite-N target.
